description: Find Python generic_op fabric CCL usages

summary: CCL fabric op: 2 programs (send@sender_coord, receive@receiver_coord) via MeshProgramDescriptor. Seed output=input copy (clone/copy) on all devices since only receiver runs a writing program; test requires non-receiver shards unchanged. Intermediate uses input layout (not design RM) to support bf8b TILE. Reuse proven C++ writer_send/reader_receive kernels verbatim.
design_deviations: intermediate layout = input layout not ROW_MAJOR (design bug: bf8b has no RM)

detail: bf16 TILE Linear (1,1,96,64) PASSED end-to-end on bh_8xP150_p2p sim: fabric init + handshake + transfer + identity check. 1 passed, 58 deselected in 34.76s

summary: bf8b failed at input_tensor.element_size() (block-float has no per-element byte size). Fixed: intermediate landing buffer uses uint8 ROW_MAJOR proxy for bf8b (pure byte staging). bf8b single case now PASS.

detail: All 59 acceptance-test cases PASS on bh_8xP150_p2p (2,4) sim: test_point_to_point 50 (bf16/f32/bf8b x TILE/RM x Linear/Ring x 5 shapes incl non-aligned) + nonparticipating 4 + output_tensor 4 + program_cache 1. 0 failures.
